questions.question: Describe the advantages of varying the bandwidth in a computer network, and explain how it can improve network performance.
questions.hint: Consider the types of traffic and devices on the network

questions.question: What are the limitations of a single-bandwidth network, and how can varying the bandwidth address these limitations?
questions.hint: Think about the different applications and services on the network

questions.question: A company is planning to use a wireless network that will support multiple devices and applications. How can varying the bandwidth in this network improve its performance and reliability?
questions.hint: Consider the types of devices and applications that will be used
